mapper.insert: insert into `appointment` (user_id, department_id, doctor_id, date, status, time) values (#{userId}, #{departmentId}, #{doctorId}, #{date}, #{status}, #{time})
mapper.update:
update `appointment`
user_id = #{userId},
department_id = #{departmentId},
doctor_id = #{doctorId},
date = #{date},
status = #{status},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select a.*, u.id as userId, u.name as patientName from `appointment` a left join `user` u on a.user_id = u.id where a.doctor_id = #{doctorId} and a.status = '已确认' order by a.time asc
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appointment WHERE date = #{date}
